textPlain: Hi everyone, I just built a GPU dashboard to check the utilization on NVIDIA cards directly in your browser. It also works with multiple GPUs. The idea is to have real-time metrics from a remote GPU server instead of running nvidia-smi. Let me know if you try it out!

Obligatory reminder that "GPU utilisation" as a percentage is meaningless metric and does not tell you how well your GPU is utilised.Does not change the usefulness of this dashboard, just wanted to point it out.
